document.source_title: Days after NEET paper leak, Cabinet approves appointment of 4 officers to NTA

claims.claim_text: The Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved the appointment of four officers to the National Testing Agency (NTA).
claims.evidence_text: the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved the appointment of four officers to the National Testing Agency (NTA).

entities.name: National Testing Agency
entities.description: An agency responsible for conducting entrance examinations in India.

entities.name: Anuja Bapat
entities.description: A 1998-batch Indian Statistical Service officer appointed as Joint Secretary in the NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Anuja Bapat, a 1998-batch Indian Statistical Service officer

entities.name: Ruchita Vij
entities.description: A 2004-batch Indian Revenue Service officer appointed as Joint Secretary in the NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Ruchita Vij, a 2004-batch Indian Revenue Service (Customs and Indirect Taxes) officer

entities.name: Akash Jain
entities.description: A 2013-batch Indian Revenue Service officer appointed as Joint Director in the NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Akash Jain, a 2013-batch Indian Revenue Service (Income Tax) officer

entities.name: Aditya Rajendra Bhojgadhiya
entities.description: A 2013-batch Indian Audit and Accounts Service officer appointed as Joint Director in the NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Aditya Rajendra Bhojgadhiya, a 2013-batch Indian Audit and Accounts Service officer

events.evidence_text: the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved the appointment of four officers to the National Testing Agency (NTA)
a retest is to be held on June 21

metrics.name: number of candidates
metrics.evidence_text: NEET-UG, which was held on May 3 for over 22 lakh candidates
